notes: Canonical field registry for subtype field templates. Field keys use prefixes asset.*, capability.*, vin_profile.*. Aliases included for backwards compatibility (e.g., name->asset.display_name).

fields.name: Description / Notes
fields.description: Constrained notes. Keep short; avoid operational data that should be structured.

fields.name: Owned By Organization
fields.description: Customer that owns the asset (for customer assets).

fields.name: VIN Decode Status
fields.description: Status of last VIN decode attempt.
